'''charate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kickingly|kickingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kickingly|kickingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| charate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:charate|charate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:charatesher|charatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:charatesherĂ«m|charatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:charatero|charatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:charateshĂ«|charateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:charateshĂ«m|charateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokicharatero|gokicharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokicharateshĂ«|gokicharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokicharateshĂ«m|gokicharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gocharankerom|gocharankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocharankeshĂ«|gocharankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocharankeshĂ«m|gocharankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gocharankeya|gocharankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:charaterom|charaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:charatemu|charatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:charateya|charateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokicharaterom|gokicharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokicharatemu|gokicharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokicharateya|gokicharateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chararate|chararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chararatesher|chararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chararatesherĂ«m|chararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chararatero|chararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chararateshĂ«|chararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chararateshĂ«m|chararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichararatero|gokichararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichararateshĂ«|gokichararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichararateshĂ«m|gokichararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochararankerom|gochararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochararankeshĂ«|gochararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochararankeshĂ«m|gochararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochararankeya|gochararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chararaterom|chararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chararatemu|chararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chararateya|chararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichararaterom|gokichararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichararatemu|gokichararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichararateya|gokichararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠte|chĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠtesher|chĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠtero|chĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠrĂŠtero|gokichĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠterom|chĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠtemu|chĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠrĂŠteya|chĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠrĂŠterom|gokichĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠrĂŠteya|gokichĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafrafte|chafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafraftesher|chafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafraftesherĂ«m|chafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafraftero|chafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafrafteshĂ«|chafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafrafteshĂ«m|chafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafraftero|gokichafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafrafteshĂ«|gokichafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafrafteshĂ«m|gokichafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafrafnkerom|gochafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafrafnkeshĂ«|gochafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafrafnkeshĂ«m|gochafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafrafnkeya|gochafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafrafterom|chafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafraftemu|chafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafrafteya|chafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafrafterom|gokichafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafraftemu|gokichafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafrafteya|gokichafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
